final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit binary AND gate instead of an OR gate.
module binary_or_gate (
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    output reg [3:0] out);always @(*) begin
        out = a | b;
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit binary AND gate instead of an OR gate.
